heading: Coast Guard Reserve
label: 10114 Coast Guard Reserve
text: As provided in section 701 of title 14, the Coast Guard Reserve is a component of the Coast Guard and is organized, administered, trained, and supplied under the direction of the Commandant of the Coast Guard. Laws applicable to the Coast Guard Reserve are set forth in chapter 21 of title 14 ( et seq.).1114 U.S.C. 701See References in Text note below.1
